title: Castle Pack
body:
## Castle Pack
A fabric modpack with various performance mods. Perfect for a vanilla-like medieval fantasy playthrough.

### Content mods
- Handcrafted: Tables, chairs, and much more!
- Supplementaries: A lot of trinkets and new decorations
- Farmer's delight: New placeable foods, and some cooking utensils

### Visual mods
- Customizable elytra
- 3d Skin layers
- Show me your skin: Make your armor invisible
- Iris shaders with complementary reimagined

### Quality of life
- Tweakaroo: Place blocks with an offset, and choose the rotation
- Trinkets + Elytra Slot: Dedicated Elytra slot
- Better trims: Gives benefits to armor trims
- Inventorio: Slots for every tool
- Item swapper: Switch between blocks quickly
- QuickShulker: Open shulkers from your inventory
- Lighty: Light level overlay

And many more...
